comment: Absolutely magical! Waking up to Kanchenjunga at sunrise was life-changing. The hosts were incredibly warm and the tea was the best I have ever tasted.
Perfect getaway from the city chaos. The cottage is cozy, the food is delicious, and the views are unreal. We will definitely be back!
Beautiful property with stunning mountain views. The host family made us feel at home. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Darjeeling!
